sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Goldman Sachs Predicts Uneventful Fed Policy Review Ahead
feed.summary: Goldman Sachs anticipates an uneventful Federal Reserve policy review due to stable inflation and job growth, suggesting interest rates will remain unchanged. The firm forecasts two rate cuts this year, starting in June, to address potential economic slowdown. Despite a slight slowdown in December, the labor market remains strong, further supporting the Fed's decision to maintain current borrowing costs at its January meeting.

feed.title: Merck and Revolution Medicines Talks May Restart
feed.summary: Talks between Merck and Revolution Medicines may restart despite an earlier stall due to price disagreements, with Wall Street analysts viewing current stock dips as a buying opportunity. Revolution Medicines' experimental drug daraxonrasib, which targets RAS genes in major cancers, is in late-stage trials and has received fast-track review. Analysts have raised price targets for RVMD, citing the potential for an M&A scenario or significant upside if the company remains independent.

feed.title: Holding(s) in Company
feed.summary: This article details a notification of major holdings in Diversified Energy PLC by BlackRock, Inc. BlackRock's total voting rights in the company decreased slightly from 5.78% to 5.75%, crossing a notification threshold on January 22, 2026. The report provides a breakdown of direct and indirect voting rights, financial instruments, and the intricate chain of controlled undertakings through which BlackRock holds these voting rights.

feed.title: Markel promotes Ben House as energy, power director as firm merges energy teams
feed.summary: Markel Insurance has promoted Ben House to Director of Energy and Power, a role in which he will lead the firm's global renewable energy portfolio and existing energy teams. This appointment unifies Markel's energy operations to support clients across the entire energy value chain. House will manage a team of underwriters, analysts, and risk engineers to enhance customer relationships and streamline underwriting processes.

feed.title: Oracle's $523 Billion Remaining Performance Obligations Positioning for AI Success
feed.summary: Oracle's remaining performance obligations (RPO) have soared to $523 billion, a 438% year-over-year increase, driven by strong customer commitments from companies like Meta and NVIDIA, positioning the company for significant future revenue in AI. Despite a recent 5% stock decline, Oracle's stock has risen 200% over the past five years, though challenges remain from infrastructure costs and competition in the cloud market. Analysts have mixed views, with some lowering price targets due to concerns about EPS targets and funding needs for AI infrastructure, while others remain bullish on its long-term potential.

feed.title: Canaccord Genuity downgrades Lifetime Brands stock rating to Hold on weak results
feed.summary: Canaccord Genuity downgraded Lifetime Brands (NASDAQ:LCUT) from Buy to Hold, lowering its price target to $3.50 from $4.00, due to consistently disappointing results since March 2023. The firm cited a lack of anticipated organic growth, absence of significant M&A activity, and a challenging macroeconomic environment. This downgrade follows poor third-quarter 2025 results where both EPS and revenue missed analyst expectations, indicating ongoing struggles for the kitchenware company.

feed.title: Norfolk Southern purchases former International Paper mill site in Lawrence County
feed.summary: Norfolk Southern has acquired the 1,800-acre former International Paper mill site in Lawrence County, Alabama, aiming to attract an industrial client for long-term rail service. The site, once the world's largest paper mill, closed in 2013, costing 1,100 jobs. This acquisition seeks to leverage Norfolk Southern's extensive reach and capital to bring significant industry and development to the area.

feed.title: Equities Analysts Set Expectations for FIS FY2025 Earnings
feed.summary: Equities analysts have set their expectations for Fidelity National Information Services (FIS) FY2025 earnings, with KeyCorp increasing its EPS estimate to $5.78, while the company's guidance and consensus estimate remain around $5.74. Despite beating last quarter's earnings and revenue estimates, FIS stock is trading near recent lows with a high P/E ratio, and it has a mixed analyst rating of "Hold" with an average target price of $79.94. Insider buying activity from Director Jeffrey A. Goldstein was noted, and the company recently paid a quarterly dividend of $0.40.

feed.title: Scotiabank Has Positive Outlook for PEG FY2025 Earnings
feed.summary: Scotiabank has raised its FY2025 EPS estimate for Public Service Enterprise Group (PEG) to $4.04, aligning with the company's guidance and exceeding the Street's consensus. This positive outlook follows PEG's recent quarterly earnings beat, where it surpassed revenue and EPS expectations. The stock currently holds a "Moderate Buy" consensus rating from analysts, trading around $78.28 with a 3.2% dividend yield.

feed.title: Will Analyst Support and Q3 2026 Outlook Shift Gen Digital's (GEN) Consumer Cybersecurity Narrative?
feed.summary: Gen Digital (GEN) is highlighted as a top cybersecurity stock for 2026, with recent Hold and Buy ratings from RBC Capital and UBS ahead of its Q3 2026 earnings. The company's investment narrative focuses on long-term demand for consumer and small-business cybersecurity and its integrated security platform strategy. Despite positive guidance, investors are cautioned about the current share price potentially being 25% above fair value and concerns regarding leverage and margin pressure.

feed.title: Did KB Home’s (KBH) New Energy-Efficient Communities and Dividend Move Just Reframe Its Investment Narrative?
feed.summary: KB Home recently announced new energy-efficient communities and reaffirmed its quarterly dividend, reinforcing its existing investment narrative focused on disciplined capital returns, personalization, and efficiency, despite expected earnings and revenue declines. While these initiatives support pricing power, they are unlikely to significantly impact near-term earnings, with overall demand and pricing pressure remaining key concerns. Investors should consider the mixed signals of declining forecasts and ongoing capital returns when evaluating the company's prospects.

feed.title: Assessing Huron Consulting Group (HURN) Valuation After Recent 3‑Month Share Price Gain
feed.summary: Huron Consulting Group (HURN) has seen a 12% share price gain over the past three months, prompting a valuation assessment. Simply Wall St's analysis suggests the stock is undervalued with a fair value of $206.75 against a current price of $171.34, driven by investments in digital transformation. However, potential risks include budget cuts from clients and rising operational costs.

feed.title: Novagold Faces Disclosure Control Weakness, S-3 Ineligibility and Investor Confidence Risks After Late 8-K Filing
feed.summary: Novagold Resources Inc. (NG) has reported a material weakness in its disclosure controls following a late filing of a Form 8-K concerning a director's resignation. This lapse raises risks regarding the company's ability to meet reporting obligations, access capital markets, and maintain investor confidence, potentially affecting its share price. The company's ineligibility to use Form S-3 until July 2026 further restricts its financial flexibility.

feed.title: Stripes Beauty launches at Ulta Beauty through Wellness boutique rollout
feed.summary: Naomi Watts' pro-aging brand, Stripes Beauty, has expanded its reach by launching at Ulta Beauty. Its products, focused on menopause and midlife wellness, are now available on ulta.com and in select Wellness by Ulta Beauty boutiques. This partnership strengthens Ulta Beauty's wellness category and addresses an underserved market for midlife shoppers.

feed.title: Will Raymond James’ Downgrade to Market Perform Change Cheesecake Factory’s (CAKE) Narrative?
feed.summary: Raymond James analyst Brian Vaccaro downgraded The Cheesecake Factory (NASDAQ: CAKE) to a Market Perform rating, indicating a more cautious view on its short-term prospects. This downgrade prompts investors to focus on execution risks around margins, leverage, and slower forecast growth, rather than altering the fundamental investment narrative for the company. Despite the downgrade, the article suggests that investors should continue to evaluate the company's brand strength, restaurant occupancy, and cost discipline.

feed.title: Nvidia Corporation (NVDA) RBC Capital Forecasts Almost 30% Upside
feed.summary: RBC Capital Markets has reiterated its "Buy" rating for Nvidia Corporation (NVDA), maintaining a 12-month price target of $240 per share, indicating a significant upside. Analyst Srini Pajjuri's confidence stems from Nvidia's strong position in AI and accelerated computing, sustained data center demand, and robust earnings visibility. The firm believes Nvidia's software ecosystem, pricing power, and innovation will ensure long-term technological leadership despite elevated valuation.

feed.title: Enphase Energy Inc. Stock Underperforms Friday When Compared To Competitors
feed.summary: Enphase Energy Inc. stock underperformed on Friday compared to its competitors. The article mentions that Unity Software reported strong fourth-quarter financial results with a significant revenue increase, although it recorded a quarterly loss per share. The content implies a contrast where Enphase Energy did not perform as well on the specified day.

feed.title: French Connection and G-III Ink North American Licensing Deal
feed.summary: French Connection Group has partnered with G-III Apparel Group for a long-term licensing deal in North America. G-III will be responsible for manufacturing and distributing French Connection men's and women's apparel and some accessories. This collaboration aims to expand French Connection's reach and relevance in the North American market, fitting into G-III's strategy of growing its portfolio of strategic licenses.

feed.title: KT Board Meeting Disrupted by Heated Exchanges Over Alleged Outside Director Intervention in Investment and Personnel Matters
feed.summary: A KT Corporation board meeting was disrupted by heated exchanges and profanity over allegations that a specific outside director, identified as 'A', intervened in the company's investment and personnel decisions, particularly regarding an investment in German satellite firm Rivada. Director 'B' reportedly used profanity, leading to the suspension of the debate. The board is set to revisit the matter, with Director 'A' denying wrongdoing and prepared to present counterarguments, while the Compliance Committee continues its review of the facts and procedural appropriateness.

feed.title: Stride (LRN) Reports Q4: Everything You Need To Know Ahead Of Earnings
feed.summary: Stride (LRN) is set to report its Q4 earnings, with analysts expecting a 6.9% year-on-year revenue growth to $627.9 million and adjusted earnings of $2.32 per share. The company has a history of beating revenue estimates and its shares have seen positive investor sentiment, rising 10% in the last month. Investors are keen to see if Stride can maintain its growth trajectory and meet or exceed these expectations.

feed.title: Citi analysts believe that the selloff of General Electric (GE.US) by investors in the final quarter of last year was excessive, providing a better buying opportunity.
feed.summary: Citi analysts view the Q4 selloff of General Electric (GE.US) as an overreaction, presenting a strong buying opportunity. They believe GE has the potential to exceed full-year earnings expectations and could become the first publicly traded aerospace and defense company to reach a trillion-dollar market capitalization. Citi has increased its 2026 target price for GE to $380, maintaining a "Buy" rating.

feed.title: (IAU.WT) Long Term Investment Analysis (IAU.WT:CA)
feed.summary: This article provides a long-term investment analysis for i-80 Gold Corp. Common share purchase warrants (IAU.WT:CA), issued on January 25, 2026. It includes AI-generated trading signals, showing "Strong" ratings for near and mid-term, and "Weak" for long-term. The report suggests buying near $0.27 with no specific target and a stop loss at $0.27.

feed.title: Sean Duffy Says Flight Cancellations Are At Levels Worse Than Covid Amid Winter Storm, Urges Travelers To Not Choose Airlines That Price-Gouge
feed.summary: Transport Secretary Sean Duffy stated that flight cancellations due to a severe winter storm are at levels comparable to the COVID-19 pandemic in March 2020, with over 11,000 cancellations and 17,000 delays. He highlighted staffing issues within the DOT, including shortages of air traffic controllers, pilots, and airport staff. Duffy also advised travelers to avoid airlines engaging in price gouging, as no government mechanisms exist to prevent it.

feed.title: Kroger to close stores early Sunday evening throughout the Greater Cincinnati area
feed.summary: Kroger announced early store closures in the Greater Cincinnati area, including parts of Dayton and Northern Kentucky, effective 6 p.m. on Sunday due to 9-12 inches of snow and hazardous road conditions. Stores are expected to reopen with normal hours on Monday morning. Other grocery stores like Meijer were reported to maintain regular hours but cancel pickup orders.

feed.title: Gladstone Investment Announces Monthly Cash Distributions for January, February and March 2026, and Earnings Release and Conference Call Dates for the Third Fiscal Quarter
feed.summary: Gladstone Investment Corporation announced monthly cash distributions of $0.08 per share for January, February, and March 2026, totaling $0.24 for the quarter. The company also disclosed its plan to report third fiscal quarter earnings on February 3, 2026, with a conference call scheduled for February 4, 2026, to discuss the results. This announcement provides investors with key dates for dividend payments and financial updates.

feed.title: Seagate Technology (STX) Q4 Earnings: What To Expect
feed.summary: Seagate Technology (STX) is preparing to report its Q4 earnings on Tuesday after market close. Analysts expect the company's revenue to grow 18.3% year-on-year to $2.75 billion, with adjusted earnings projected at $2.84 per share. Sentiment in the semiconductors segment is positive, with Seagate's stock up 23% in the last month and an average analyst price target suggesting further upside.

feed.title: Earnings to watch: F5 (FFIV) reports Q4 results tomorrow
feed.summary: This article announces that F5 (FFIV) is scheduled to report its Q4 earnings tomorrow. It serves as a brief heads-up for investors and interested parties to watch for the upcoming financial results.

feed.title: Earnings To Watch: General Motors (GM) Reports Q4 Results Tomorrow
feed.summary: General Motors (NYSE:GM) is set to report its Q4 earnings tomorrow before market open. Analysts anticipate a 4% year-on-year revenue decline to $45.81 billion and adjusted earnings of $2.26 per share, despite the company's consistent track record of exceeding revenue estimates in the past. Investors are keenly watching GM as sentiment in the broader industrials segment has shown positive growth.

feed.title: Nomura Elevates Alibaba Group (BABA.US) TP to US$237, Keeps Buy Rating
feed.summary: Nomura has increased its target price for Alibaba Group Holding (BABA.US) to US$237 from US$193, while maintaining a "Buy" rating. This upgrade follows reports that Alibaba plans to spin off its semiconductor chip business, T-Head, for a separate listing, an IPO analysis suggests is highly probable. Nomura sees T-Head as one of China's top chip designers.

feed.title: Synchrony Financial (SYF) Q4 Earnings Report Preview: What To Look For
feed.summary: Synchrony Financial (SYF) is preparing to report its Q4 earnings this Tuesday. Analysts anticipate a 1.3% year-on-year revenue growth to $3.85 billion and adjusted earnings of $2.02 per share. The company has a history of missing Wall Street revenue estimates, and its stock has recently declined, contrasting with a flat performance in the broader consumer finance segment.

feed.title: Invesco Earnings: What To Look For From IVZ
feed.summary: Invesco (NYSE: IVZ) is set to report earnings this Tuesday before market hours. Analysts anticipate a 7.7% year-on-year revenue growth to $1.25 billion and adjusted earnings of $0.58 per share. The stock has seen a 5.8% increase over the last month, with an average analyst price target of $30.30, compared to its current share price of $28.44.

feed.title: A Look At State Street (STT) Valuation After Q4 Earnings Beat And Growing Digital Fee Revenues
feed.summary: State Street (STT) recently reported strong Q4 2025 earnings, surpassing analyst expectations for both revenue and earnings, driven by fee income and digital solutions. Despite a recent dip in share price, the stock is considered moderately undervalued by some models, trading at a 19% discount to its intrinsic value. The narrative suggests continued growth from its SPDR ETF franchise and digital asset offerings, but also cautions about risks like fee pressure and interest rate impacts.

feed.title: Did Peer-Leading Margins And Expected EPS For CR Just Shift Crane's Investment Narrative?
feed.summary: Industrial conglomerate Crane Holdings (NYSE: CR) is expected to report strong quarterly earnings, with analysts forecasting EPS of US$1.41–US$1.42. The company currently leads its peer group in revenue growth and gross profit margin, reinforcing a bullish investment narrative. While the near-term focus is on the upcoming earnings and management's guidance, differing fair value estimates from the Simply Wall St Community highlight varying expectations for the company's future performance.

feed.title: 7 Best Defense Stocks to Buy in January 2026 (Expert Picks)
feed.summary: This article identifies the seven best defense stocks to invest in for January 2026, citing geopolitical tensions, robust government spending, and strong financial performances as key drivers. Companies like Lockheed Martin, General Dynamics, and RTX Corporation are highlighted for their substantial backlogs and contracts, while specialized players like AeroVironment and international firm BAE Systems offer diversification. The article emphasizes the sector's stability and growth potential due to ongoing global military modernization and an increasing defense budget.

feed.title: Union Pacific (UNP) To Report Earnings Tomorrow: Here Is What To Expect
feed.summary: Union Pacific (UNP) is scheduled to report its Q4 earnings before the bell tomorrow. Analysts anticipate flat year-on-year revenue of $6.12 billion and adjusted earnings of $2.87 per share. The company has a history of missing Wall Street's revenue estimates, and recent peer results show mixed performance in the transportation and logistics sector.

feed.title: SNDL Inc. (SNDL) Completes Initial 1CM Retail Acquisition, Expands Footprint Across Western Canada
feed.summary: SNDL Inc. has completed the initial acquisition of five 1CM cannabis retail locations in Alberta and Saskatchewan as part of an amended agreement to acquire a total of 32 stores. This move is expected to strengthen SNDL's position in the Canadian cannabis retail market, following a quarter where the company reported record free cash flow. The remaining 27 Ontario-based stores are pending regulatory approval.

feed.title: Sysco Earnings: What To Look For From SYY
feed.summary: Sysco (NYSE: SYY) is set to announce its earnings this Tuesday before market open. Analysts anticipate a 3.1% year-on-year revenue growth to $20.77 billion and adjusted earnings of $0.98 per share, with estimates largely reconfirmed over the past 30 days. The company's stock is up 2.3% over the last month, nearing an average analyst price target of $86.75 against its current share price of $76.31.

feed.title: HFRO: Resilient Real Estate Fund But Struggling In High Interest Rate Environment
feed.summary: Highland Opportunities and Income Fund (HFRO) is rated a "Hold" due to its substantial 47% discount to NAV, navigating challenges in the real estate sector. Although its 7.5% yield is covered by net investment income, high leverage and declining NAV pose risks, particularly if interest rates don't decrease. The fund's significant exposure to real estate and private entities makes it highly sensitive to interest rate fluctuations and limits its price appreciation compared to sector ETFs.

feed.title: Investors heavily search Aptiv PLC (APTV): Here is what you need to know
feed.summary: The article indicates that Aptiv PLC (APTV) is experiencing high search interest from investors. This suggests that there might be recent news, financial performance, or market speculation driving curiosity about the company. Investors are likely looking for information to understand its current standing and future prospects.

feed.title: Hope Bancorp (HOPE) Q4 Earnings: What To Expect
feed.summary: Hope Bancorp (HOPE) is set to report its Q4 earnings on Tuesday morning. Analysts anticipate a 24% year-on-year revenue growth to $143.4 million and adjusted earnings of $0.26 per share. The regional bank sector has shown positive sentiment, with Hope Bancorp up 5% in the last month, nearing its average analyst price target.

feed.title: A Look At Orla Mining (TSX:OLA) Valuation After Record Production, First Dividend And South Railroad Progress
feed.summary: Orla Mining (TSX:OLA) has garnered attention after achieving record gold production in 2025, initiating its first quarterly dividend, and advancing its South Railroad Gold Project. Despite a significant 90-day share price increase of 74.57%, analysts consider the stock to be modestly undervalued by 2.9% relative to their price target of CA$26.02, factoring in robust growth forecasts and diversified revenue streams. However, its high P/E ratio of 116.6x, compared to the industry average, suggests that future performance must be strong to justify the current valuation.

feed.title: Nvidia Supply Deal In Crosshairs, Samsung Set To Start HBM4 Chip Production Next Month As Korean Giant Takes On SK Hynix: Report
feed.summary: Samsung Electronics is reportedly preparing to begin manufacturing its next-generation HBM4 chips as early as next month, aiming to supply Nvidia and compete with SK Hynix, which currently dominates the HBM market. Samsung has passed HBM4 qualification tests for both Nvidia and AMD and expects to start shipments to Nvidia soon. This move is critical as Nvidia prepares to launch its new AI platform, Vera Rubin, which will use HBM4 memory, intensifying the rivalry between the two Korean memory chip giants.

feed.title: CSX outlines 200–300 basis points margin expansion for 2026 while resetting long-term targets
feed.summary: CSX announced its updated long-term financial targets, aiming for a 200-300 basis point margin expansion by 2026. The company also disclosed its new long-term operating ratio target of high-50s, replacing the previous mid-50s goal. This announcement was made during their investor day presentation, indicating a strategic shift in their financial outlook.

feed.title: UnitedHealth (UNH) Q4 Earnings: What To Expect
feed.summary: UnitedHealth (UNH) is preparing to report its Q4 earnings this Tuesday. Analysts anticipate revenue growth of 12.7% year-on-year to $113.6 billion and adjusted earnings of $2.11 per share. Despite missing revenue estimates five times in the last two years, investor sentiment in the healthcare sector is positive, with UNH shares up 7.9% recently.

feed.title: What To Expect From Texas Instruments's (TXN) Q4 Earnings
feed.summary: Texas Instruments (TXN) is set to report its Q4 earnings on Tuesday afternoon. Analysts expect an 11.3% year-on-year revenue growth to $4.46 billion and adjusted earnings of $1.29 per share. The company has a mixed track record with revenue estimates, but sentiment in the semiconductor sector has been positive, with Texas Instruments's stock up 9.9% over the last month.

feed.title: Merck & Co Inc. Ends Acquisition Talks with Revolution Medicines Valued at $30 Billion
feed.summary: Merck & Co Inc. has ended acquisition discussions with Revolution Medicines, reportedly due to an inability to agree on a $30 billion valuation, causing Revolution's stock to plummet by over 19% in after-hours trading. Despite the halted talks, future negotiations or interest from other suitors remain possible, especially with upcoming clinical data releases from Revolution Medicines. This development highlights the competitive nature of the biotech M&A landscape, following earlier reports that AbbVie was also in discussions but later denied pursuing a deal.

feed.title: HP Inc. Stock: Quiet Rally, Loud Questions – Can This PC Giant Keep Surprising Wall Street?
feed.summary: HP Inc.'s stock has quietly outperformed expectations due to a recovering PC market and a focus on cash returns, sparking questions about its sustained momentum. Despite mixed analyst views and an AI-obsessed market, the company has seen positive returns, cost-cutting, and share buybacks. The article explores HP's strategy to leverage the PC replacement cycle, recurring revenue from print services, and AI-adjacent initiatives to maintain its attractive equity story.

feed.title: Earnings To Watch: F5 (FFIV) Reports Q4 Results Tomorrow
feed.summary: F5 (FFIV) is set to announce its Q4 earnings results after market close on Tuesday. Analysts anticipate a 1.4% decline in revenue year-on-year to $755.7 million and adjusted earnings of $3.65 per share. Despite a sector-wide sell-off, F5's stock price has remained unchanged, and its average analyst price target is $295.30.

feed.title: What To Expect From HCA Healthcare’s (HCA) Q4 Earnings
feed.summary: HCA Healthcare is scheduled to report its Q4 earnings on Tuesday morning, with analysts expecting revenue growth of 7.7% year-on-year to $19.69 billion and adjusted earnings of $7.47 per share. The company has a strong track record of beating revenue estimates, and investor sentiment in the healthcare providers & services segment has been positive despite HCA's stock price remaining unchanged recently.

feed.title: Earnings To Watch: General Motors (GM) Reports Q4 Results Tomorrow
feed.summary: General Motors (GM) is set to report its Q4 earnings tomorrow before the market opens. Analysts expect a revenue decline of 4% year-on-year to $45.81 billion and adjusted earnings of $2.26 per share. The company has a history of exceeding revenue estimates, and peer results in the industrials segment offer mixed signals, with GM's stock currently down 4% over the last month.
